tests.name: graph view plugin message dispatch marks the webview as ready after applying the ready payloads
graph view plugin message dispatch forwards plugin interaction events through the event bus bridge
graph view plugin message dispatch runs plugin context menu actions against resolved graph targets
graph view plugin message dispatch runs plugin exporters through the extension-side plugin api
graph view plugin message dispatch treats missing plugin exporters as a no-op
graph view plugin message dispatch runs plugin toolbar actions through the extension-side plugin api
graph view plugin message dispatch treats missing plugin toolbar actions as a no-op
graph view plugin message dispatch runs plugin context menu edge actions against resolved graph edges
graph view plugin message dispatch returns false for unrelated messages
createGraphViewPrimaryExportHandlers exports snapshot-backed symbol data when structured snapshot files exist
createGraphViewPrimaryExportHandlers falls back to live file analysis when the snapshot is empty or missing
createGraphViewPrimaryExportHandlers uses an empty analysis map when no analyzer is available
dispatchGraphViewPluginReadyMessage sends ready payloads and notifies the first ready event
dispatchGraphViewPluginReadyMessage waits for first workspace readiness and skips duplicate notification
dispatchGraphViewPluginReadyMessage sends filter patterns loaded during webview ready instead of stale pre-load values
dispatchGraphViewPluginReadyMessage uses the current depth mode and calls optional plugin exporters when available
dispatchGraphViewPluginReadyMessage falls back to depth mode false and skips missing optional plugin senders
graph view primary routed dispatch ordering short-circuits when the node-file router handles the message
graph view primary routed dispatch ordering continues through routers until a later handler claims the message
graph view primary routed dispatch ordering returns handled when the command router claims the message
graph view primary routed dispatch ordering returns handled when the physics router claims the message
graph view primary routed dispatch ordering returns handled when the surface router claims the message
graph view primary routed dispatch ordering returns unhandled only after every route declines the message
graph view primary message dispatch returns the routed result when the routed handlers handle the message
graph view primary message dispatch falls through to the stateful handlers when routed handlers do not handle the message
createGraphViewPrimaryNodeFileHandlers reads timeline values and preserves file action handlers
createGraphViewPrimaryNodeFileHandlers routes graph index and refresh through the expected provider methods
createGraphViewPrimaryLegendMessageState seeds user legends from the primary message context
createGraphViewPrimarySettingsMessageState reads the current settings state from the primary message context
graph view primary routed dispatch handles node/file messages before later handlers run
graph view primary routed dispatch routes export messages through the live export saver handlers
graph view primary routed dispatch returns false when no routed message family handles the input
graph view primary stateful dispatch returns updated user groups from group messages
graph view primary stateful dispatch returns updated filter patterns from settings messages
graph view primary stateful dispatch returns false when neither stateful family handles the input
